Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: Represents a Clash of Clans tournament event.

category.description: The Town Hall level category (e.g., TH16).

prizePool.description: The total prize pool in coins.

currentPlayers.description: The number of players currently registered.

maxPlayers.description: The maximum capacity of the tournament.

imageUrl.description: A visual representation of the tournament arena.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user statistics and account information.

tag.description: The unique Clash of Clans player tag.

rank.description: The user's league or ranking status.

MatchRecord.title: Match Record
MatchRecord.description: Represents a single match result for verification.

screenshotUrl.description: URL of the uploaded proof screenshot.

verificationReason.description: Notes from AI or Admin verification.

/tournaments/{tournamentId}.description: Public list of all available and past tournaments.

/users/{userId}.description: Private user profiles containing sensitive data like balance.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Match records for verification and record keeping.
